title: Jon Trux
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Jon}}
{{Image|person}}
'''Jon Trux''' was credited as editor for issues [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2|2]] through [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15|15]] of the ''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly]]'' magazine, and may have held the same position for the [[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 1|first issue]] as well.

{{Bio-stub}}

He also contributed articles to the following issues:

*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 2]]'': "Choreography of a [[Starfighter combat/Legends|Dogfight]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 3]]'': An interview with [[John Stears]]
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 4]]'': "The Building of [[R2-D2/Legends|Artoo]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 5]]'': "The Power Behind the Throne"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 6]]'': "The Spaceships of [[Star Wars]]"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 7]]'': "Beams, [[Blaster/Legends|Blasters]], and Battlestations!"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 13]]'': "The Shooting of Star Wars Part Two—On the Floor"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 14]]'': "Star Wars and the Effect Pioneers"
*''[[Star Wars Official Poster Monthly 15]]'': "[[Wikipedia: Space Shuttle Columbia|Orbiter 102]]—First Space Freighter"
